parameters.query:
=SELECT 
  id,
  salesforce_id,
  first_name,
  last_name,
  email,
  phone,
  procedure_interest,
  last_visit_date,
  consultation_notes,
  call_recording_summary,
  engagement_score,
  preferred_channel,
  created_at
FROM patients
WHERE 1=1
  {{ $parameter["queryParameters"]["procedure_interest"] ? "AND procedure_interest = '" + $parameter["queryParameters"]["procedure_interest"] + "'" : "" }}
  {{ $parameter["queryParameters"]["min_engagement_score"] ? "AND engagement_score >= " + $parameter["queryParameters"]["min_engagement_score"] : "" }}
  {{ $parameter["queryParameters"]["preferred_channel"] ? "AND preferred_channel = '" + $parameter["queryParameters"]["preferred_channel"] + "'" : "" }}
ORDER BY engagement_score DESC, last_visit_date DESC
LIMIT {{ $parameter["queryParameters"]["limit"] || 50 }};

=SELECT 
  id,
  salesforce_id,
  first_name,
  last_name,
  email,
  phone,
  procedure_interest,
  last_visit_date,
  consultation_notes,
  call_recording_summary,
  engagement_score,
  preferred_channel,
  created_at
FROM patients
WHERE id = {{ $parameter["pathParameters"]["id"] }}
LIMIT 1;
